description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix job strategy with ubuntu-latest to build and test with different compilers (g++, clang++) and build types (Debug, Production). Install required packages, set up Python 3.8, and configure ccache. Run CMake to configure the build, build with make, and execute system and regression tests. Also, test Python bindings, generate code coverage with pytest, and upload it to Codecov.
